title: DaemonEvent::MessageRetracted missing from_pub_id field — no authorship information for SSE consumers
description: daemon/src/types.rs DaemonEvent::MessageRetracted contains message_id, for_all, and timestamp but not from_pub_id. SSE consumers (e.g. JMAP client, web UI) cannot display 'X retracted a message' because the sender is not included. dispatch_peer_retract in relay.rs has the sender_pub_id in scope but does not include it in the event. This is a public wire-format decision: once SSE clients start consuming MessageRetracted without from_pub_id, adding it later is additive but callers may not be able to display accurate attribution. The field is already validated (ownership check) so it is available.
